title: The King's Epic Adventure 2 Act 2
description:
Fierce Battle! Ganon's Invincible Army!

Credit goes to Craaazycat13 for inventing the dinnerblaster for those who just don't know for some reason. you won't get any of this in part 3.
I had limited resources in the making of this one, need I remind. and apparrantly actual AOSTH episodes were not among them. keep in mind this was made a long time ago.
King harkinian starts off his quest at Ganon's lair, A good friend of Snake's arrives to aid him, Robotnik builds a prison disguised as a dream resort.
